stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 13, which statement best defines the term "accident"?

options.a: A person is fatally or seriously injured, or the aircraft sustains damage or structural failure, or the aircraft is missing or completely inaccessible.
options.b: An occurrence related to aircraft operations that affects or could affect operational safety.
options.c: A person suffers minor injuries, or the aircraft sustains minor damage.
options.d: A person is fatally or seriously injured, or the aircraft sustains minor damage or structural failure.
